allow:
Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import sys

with open\('/mnt/d/Dropbox/OptimalCNC/agents-runner/data/runs.json', 'r'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Collect all item structures
agent_messages = []
command_executions = []
empty_items = []

for run in data:
    for agent in run.get\('agents', []\):
        items = agent.get\('items', []\)
        if len\(items\) == 0:
            empty_items.append\(run['id']\)
        for item in items:
            item_type = item.get\('type'\)
            if item_type == 'agent_message':
                agent_messages.append\(item\)
            elif item_type == 'command_execution':
                command_executions.append\(item\)

print\("=== AGENT_MESSAGE ITEMS ==="\)
if agent_messages:
    print\(f"Total count: {len\(agent_messages\)}"\)
    # Check all fields
    all_fields = set\(\)
    for item in agent_messages:
        all_fields.update\(item.keys\(\)\)
    print\(f"All fields: {sorted\(all_fields\)}"\)
    print\("\\nFirst 3 examples:"\)
    for item in agent_messages[:3]:
        print\(json.dumps\(item, indent=2\)\)
else:
    print\("No agent_message items found"\)

print\("\\n=== COMMAND_EXECUTION ITEMS ==="\)
if command_executions:
    print\(f"Total count: {len\(command_executions\)}"\)
    # Check all fields
    all_fields = set\(\)
    for item in command_executions:
        all_fields.update\(item.keys\(\)\)
    print\(f"All fields: {sorted\(all_fields\)}"\)
    print\("\\nFirst 3 examples:"\)
    for item in command_executions[:3]:
        print\(json.dumps\(item, indent=2\)\)
    
    # Check for variations in exit_code and status
    exit_codes = set\(\)
    statuses = set\(\)
    for item in command_executions:
        exit_codes.add\(item.get\('exit_code'\)\)
        statuses.add\(item.get\('status'\)\)
    print\(f"\\nUnique exit_code values: {sorted\(exit_codes\)}"\)
    print\(f"Unique status values: {sorted\(statuses\)}"\)
else:
    print\("No command_execution items found"\)

print\(f"\\n=== EMPTY ITEMS ARRAYS ==="\)
print\(f"Runs with empty items arrays: {len\(empty_items\)}"\)
if empty_items:
    print\(f"Run IDs: {empty_items}"\)
EOF)
